Road.title: Pothole on road
Road.description: There is a large pothole on the road that is causing damage to vehicles and is a safety hazard for commuters.

Road.title: Road surface damaged
Road.description: The road surface is severely damaged with cracks and uneven patches, making it difficult and dangerous to drive.

Road.title: Footpath broken
Road.description: The footpath tiles are broken and dislodged, posing a tripping hazard to pedestrians.

Road.title: Road digging not restored
Road.description: Road digging work was done for underground utilities but the road surface has not been restored, leaving a dangerous depression.

Road.title: Speed breaker missing
Road.description: A speed breaker that was previously installed has been damaged or removed, causing vehicles to over-speed in this area.

Water.title: Water supply not received
Water.description: There has been no drinking water supply to this area for multiple days, affecting all residents.

Water.title: Water pipe leakage
Water.description: A water pipe is leaking on the street, wasting large amounts of water and creating a waterlogged area.

Water.title: Contaminated water supply
Water.description: The tap water is discolored or has a foul smell, indicating possible contamination. Urgent investigation is needed.

Water.title: Low water pressure
Water.description: The water pressure in this area is very low, making it impossible to fill tanks or use water adequately.

Water.title: Water meter damaged
Water.description: The water meter installed at this property is damaged or not working correctly.

Electricity.title: Streetlight not working
Electricity.description: Several streetlights in this area are not functioning, making the street completely dark and unsafe at night.

Electricity.title: Power outage in area
Electricity.description: There is an unplanned power outage affecting multiple buildings in this area for several hours.

Electricity.title: Exposed electrical wire
Electricity.description: There is a dangling or exposed electrical wire near a public area that poses a serious electrocution risk.

Electricity.title: Transformer sparking
Electricity.description: The electrical transformer in this locality is making sparking sounds and showing signs of overheating.

Electricity.title: Electricity pole leaning
Electricity.description: An electricity pole is leaning dangerously and may fall, risking lives and power disruption.

Waste.title: Garbage not collected
Waste.description: Garbage has not been collected from this area for several days, causing a foul smell and unsanitary conditions.

Waste.title: Overflowing garbage bin
Waste.description: The public garbage bin is overflowing with waste and attracting stray animals and insects.

Waste.title: Illegal dumping of waste
Waste.description: People are illegally dumping waste and construction debris on the roadside near this location.

Waste.title: Sweeping not done
Waste.description: The road cleaning and sweeping has not been done in this area for many days, leaving debris on the streets.

Waste.title: Dead animal on road
Waste.description: A dead animal is lying on the road and needs to be removed urgently to prevent disease and bad odour.

Drainage.title: Blocked drain causing flooding
Drainage.description: A clogged storm drain is causing water to flood the road and nearby buildings during rain.

Drainage.title: Open manhole
Drainage.description: A manhole cover is missing or broken, creating a dangerous open pit on the road.

Drainage.title: Sewage overflow
Drainage.description: Sewage water is overflowing from the drain onto the road, creating extremely unhygienic conditions.

Drainage.title: Drainage not cleaned
Drainage.description: The drainage channel has not been cleaned and is choked with debris, causing stagnant water.

Drainage.title: Drain cover broken
Drainage.description: The metal grate/cover over the drain is broken or missing, posing a trip and fall hazard.

Other.title: Stray animal menace
Other.description: A large number of stray dogs or other animals in this area are causing disturbance and threatening residents.

Other.title: Illegal construction
Other.description: Unauthorized construction activity is happening near this location that may be violating building regulations.

Other.title: Public property vandalized
Other.description: Public property such as a bus shelter, park bench, or sign board has been vandalized or damaged.

Other.title: Tree fallen on road
Other.description: A large tree has fallen across the road, blocking traffic and causing a safety hazard.

Other.title: Noise pollution complaint
Other.description: There is excessive and continuous noise from nearby construction or commercial activity that is disturbing residents.
